zh: 有時獨處並不代表害羞或不合群、
en: Sometimes being alone doesn't mean shyness or antisocial behavior.

zh: 父母要察覺的是孩子在享受獨處的樂趣、
en: Parents should observe whether the child is enjoying solitude,

zh: 抑或害羞不敢與人接觸、
en: or too shy to approach others.

zh: 若是前者千萬別打擾他、
en: If it's the former, never disturb them.

zh: 則需以關懷、鼓勵的態度引導他和其他小朋友接觸、
en: guide them to meet other children with care and encouragement.

zh: 每當孩子有一小部分的進步則給予信心和鼓勵、
en: Whenever they make a small step forward, give them confidence and praise.

zh: 切記千萬別當著孩子面前說:我的孩子很害羞、
en: Never say in front of the child, "my child is so shy,"

zh: 因為一旦家長有這種期望、
en: because once a parent holds that expectation,

zh: 孩子就真會朝向害羞的性格邁進。
en: the child will truly move toward a shy personality.
